entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench landrace collection held at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the institution maintaining the sorghum landrace collection

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The overall variety of genetic characteristics within the sorghum collection

entities.name: SAMPLING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Different approaches, either random or non-random, proposed to obtain subsets of reduced size

entities.name: RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling strategy where members are selected by chance, such as the logarithmic strategy

entities.name: NON-RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling strategy where members are selected based on specific criteria, such as morpho-agronomic diversity or empirical knowledge

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: Subsets of reduced size obtained from a larger germplasm collection to facilitate efficient utilization

entities.name: LOGARITHMIC STRATEGY
entities.description: A random sampling method within a stratified collection

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT SCORE STRATEGY
entities.description: A sampling method based upon morpho-agronomic diversity

entities.name: TAXONOMIC STRATEGY
entities.description: A sampling method based upon empirical knowledge of sorghum

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: Diversity based on morphological and agronomic characteristics used for characterization

entities.name: PASSPORT DATA
entities.description: Documented information regarding the origin and characteristics of germplasm accessions

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The observable physical properties of the sorghum collection assessed through morpho-agronomic and passport data

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDICES
entities.description: A method used to measure and compare the overall diversity of the subsets

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD REACTION
entities.description: A specific character associated with the stratification of the collection

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The range of adaptation to different geographical locations covered by the landraces
